headline: Entry-facing support surfaces now settle faster and sit further back: the launch bar reaches a quieter rest state sooner, note prompts wait longer on primary entry screens, and the support rail fades further into the background.
notes: Settles the launch bar faster near the top and softens the rest state so the opening read feels calmer on home, Magazine, and My Trips.
Pushes note prompts deeper on primary entry screens and waits for the launch surface to feel truly quiet before revealing them.
Lightens the support rail one more step with subtler contrast, shorter rest-state controls, and lower visual weight by default.
